driver_subject: net: ethernet: i825xx: Convert to platform remove callback returning void
kernel_subject: platform: Provide a remove callback that returns no value
stage1_reason: Driver converted from .remove() to .remove_new() callback returning void as part of kernel-wide platform driver API migration
stage2_reason: Kernel commit introduces platform_driver's .remove_new() callback returning void, directly matching driver migration from .remove() to .remove_new()
